label: prompt_surface • dropping enabledManifest validates (list-mode replacement exists) and saves tokens
notes: The manifest-replacement architecture axis: now that capabilities_discover carries the exact paginated {"list": "enabled"} mode, dropping the prompt manifest is a VALID experiment (it used to be refused). The section must actually vanish and the surface must get strictly cheaper. Promotion still requires the CapabilityClaims/tool-use quality gates — this fixture only pins that the harness can measure the candidate.
